summary: SINGLE_FOCUS triangle with right angle at top vertex C, legs a (BLUE) and b (RED), and the green altitude h from C to the hypotenuse AB (foot F computed via projection formula). Small YELLOW Square marks the top right angle, GREEN Square marks the altitude's right angle. Right panel numerically verifies 1/h² = 1/a² + 1/b² (~0.163 = 0.080 + 0.083 ≈ 0.163 ✓). Bottom note ties it to the Basel proof: splits one lighthouse into two on a larger circle while preserving intensity.
